name: Fruit and Vegetable Interactive Plush Cube with Rabbit Rattle - Cloud Island™
description:
This Fruit and Vegetable Interactive Plush Cube with Rabbit Rattle from cloud island™ is great for fun play and learning. The set of two interactive toys includes a soft cube adorned with colorful fruits, vegetables and textures, giving your little one six different sides for delightful exploration. Also included is a beige faux-fur rabbit rattle with floppy ears and a hanging loop.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
